note: Verified Ingebrigtsen/Almgren sessions. Race-specific workouts are DISTANCE-based at the real rep distances (Ben's rule: in the specific phase, specificity beats physiological control - you go for it); only base threshold work is converted to time. Percent targets still come from the live anchor. Sources in knowledge/base-to-specific-transition.md.

workouts.name: Jakob 4x6min threshold
workouts.source: COROS-verified Jakob AM session, done multiple mornings/week, often treadmill
workouts.note: Base work stays time-based and controlled - judge it while carrying fatigue, never a race. The 5x6min in the plan is the same family.

workouts.name: Jakob 25x400m at 10k pace
workouts.source: Jakob's weekly year-round session (16 -> 20 -> 25 reps over his career)
workouts.note: Reach target pace by rep 4-6, then hold - no accelerating. The last reps get muscularly hard by themselves.

workouts.name: Jakob 25x400m at 5k pace
workouts.source: Jakob's only publicly verified race-specific session: the same 400s drift down to 5K pace as racing approaches - no new workout, just faster targets
workouts.note: Settle by rep 4-6, hold. Almgren's 5k comparison: 10x600m + 10x200m before a Stockholm DL 5000.

workouts.name: Almgren 3x3km progressive
workouts.source: COROS-verified pre-Valencia 10K sharpening workout, end of a ~170km week

workouts.name: Almgren 10x1km final check
workouts.source: COROS-verified final pre-race check before Valencia 10K
workouts.note: The last big session, 10-12 days out. After this: controlled + easy only.

workouts.name: Almgren 600s + 200s
workouts.note: 600s at ~5k effort, 200s keep speed and mechanics.

workouts.name: Almgren 3x5km progressive
workouts.source: Direct Almgren interview 3 weeks before the 2025 Valencia half (58:41): whole week kept, only Saturday hills swapped for this
workouts.elite: 3x5km on rolling roads: 14:43 / 14:25 / 14:12 (2:57 -> 2:50/km); recovery not published - 2-3min jog is the assumption
workouts.note: Progressive by rep: controlled -> strong -> near-HM effort; only the final rep approaches race intensity, ~10 / ~6 / ~3.5 s/km off race pace. Scale by shortening reps (3x2km / 3x3km / 3x4km), never to time.
